query:
UPDATE anuncios
SET tipo = 'Bonificación'
WHERE producto LIKE '%OPIOIDES%'
AND parada_id IN (
  SELECT p.id FROM paradas p WHERE
    (p.cobertizo_id = '550' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '498' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '520' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '707' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '360' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '025' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '048' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '208' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '380' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '583' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '057' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '245' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '461A' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '499' AND p.orientacion = 'O') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '653' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '070' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '091' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '605' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '003' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '013' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '222' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '012' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '163' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '218' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '423' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '184' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '186' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '188' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '341A' AND p.orientacion = 'I') OR
    (p.cobertizo_id = '465B' AND p.orientacion = 'O')
);
